query:
REPLACE INTO messages(
                        arrived_at,
                        channel_id,
                        from_id,
                        message,
                        quote,
                        receipt,
                        body_ranges,
                        attachments,
                        reactions,
                        edit,
                        edited,
                        deleted,
                        expire_timer,
                        expires_at
                    )
                    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
